description: fountel curation tags for the additive threat intel published to aimer-web. Curation is soft-by-default: everything published is treated as soft (LLM-enrichment) intel unless a source has been per-source vetted and explicitly tagged floor-eligible.

predicates.description: Marks intel from a per-source-vetted feed that aimer-web may treat as floor-eligible (deterministic-grade), setting floorEligible on the match. Absence of this tag is the default and means soft (LLM-enrichment) only. Apply only after explicit per-source vetting; more is not better.
